summary: M362 — Token migration + tab title normalization. dragon-expansion.html and balance-report.html now use canonical --rsg-* tokens (no more hardcoded #0a0204/#ffd060/etc). SkillTree tabs unified: 'Skills — Class', 'Passives — Class', 'Attributes — Class' (was 'Class' / 'Passive Tree — Class' / 'Attributes — Class'). Tokens come from nav-header.js :root injection so every page picks them up.
